突然好想講下formality scale，有補充或錯請更正
我自己對衣服formality既分類：Smart Casual(dressier) > Smart Casual(casual) > Casual(dressier) > Casual(sloppy)
上衣：
Casual(sloppy) :
(1) T-shirt
(2) Henley shirt

Casual(dressier) :
(1) Polo shirt
(2) Flannel shirt
(3) Denim shirt

Smart Casual(casual) :
(1) Oxford shirt (untucked)
(2) Simple pattern casual shirt (untucked)
(2) Simple chambray shirt (untucked)

Smart Casual(dressier) :
(1) Oxford shirt (tucked in)
(2) Simple pattern casual shirt (tucked in)
(2) Simple chambray shirt (tucked in)
(3) Simple pattern dress shirt

褲：
Casual(sloppy) :
(1) Distressed/light washed jeans
(2) Joggers
(3) Shorts
(2) Sweatpants

Casual(dressier) :
(1): Dark washed/raw denim jeans

Smart Casual(casual) :
(1) Casual chinos

Smart Casual(dressier)
(1) Dress chinos
(2) Wool trousers

外套/外衣：
Casual(sloppy) :
(1) Hoodie
(2) Athletic windbreaker
(3) Down jacket
(4) Fleece jacket

Casual(dressier) :
(1) Denim jacket
(2) Chore jacket
(3) Field jacket (MA1, M65)
(4) Pullover sweatshirt
(5) Chunky sweater/cardigan

Smart Casual(casual) :
(1) Simple sweater (V-neck/Crewneck/half-zip)
(2) Simple cardigan (V-neck/Shawl collar)
(3) Harrington jacket
(4) Classic blouson jacket

Smart Casual(dressier)
(1) Blazer/Sport coat
(2) Peacoat
(3) Trench coat
(4) Mac coat
(5) Duffle coat

鞋：
Casual(sloppy) :
(1) Flip flops
(2) Sandals
(3) Athletic sneakers

Casual(dressier) :
(1) Minimal sneakers
(2) Work boots
(3) Boat shoes

Smart Casual(casual) :
(1) Desert boots
(2) Casual leather shoes (eg. Clarks Wallabee)

Smart Casual(dressier) :
(1) Chukka boots
(2) Chelsea boots
(3) Wingtips shoes

我如果想打扮得比較好睇，又唔想太overdressed，通常會選擇Smart Casual(casual), Casual(dressier)既衣服混合穿著，例如：Denim jacket + Oxford shirt (untucked) + Casual chinos + Minimal sneakers
